_phase_o3_act_draft_note: Phase O3-ACT-DRAFT pre-authoring (mirrors Phase O2-SUGGEST-DRAFT 2026-05-07). Bundle Merkle root locked at draft authoring time; watcher (operator_initiative_advancement.py) enforces O3_ACT advancement criteria externally before this bundle is anchored on chain. Anchoring is a single-action operator gesture via parallel_o3_act_anchor.py (or anchor-cedar-bundle endpoint) once Sentry shadow_age >= 504h AND draft_payload_count >= 50 AND operator_disagreement_rate_30d < 5% AND kms_hsm_production_ready.

policies._note: Read access preserved across all phases
On-chain reads — view-only, zero gas (preserved from O2_SUGGEST)

kms-sign on commit hashes — signatures continue as inputs to downstream attestation/PR workflows. Resource scope unchanged from O2 (draft://commit_hashes/*); the production lift is at the consumer (pda-attestation-anchor + git-pr).

O3 ACTING LIFT: provenance-recording graduates from draft://shadow_log/* (O1) and draft://attestations/* (O2) to lane://provenance/** (live writes into the canonical provenance lane). kms-sign signatures attached to provenance records become permanent.

O3 ACTING LIFT: pda-attestation-anchor graduates from draft://attestations/* (O2 SUGGEST) to lane://provenance/** (REAL ON-CHAIN ANCHORING via AdjudicationRegistry/PoAdAnchorAgent). This is the headline O3 ACT authority for Sentry — anchored attestations become permanent on IoTeX testnet/mainnet. Wallet impact per anchor ~0.0008 IOTX.
git-add stays in draft scope — PRs remain operator-merge-required
O3 ACTING LIFT: ipfs-pin graduates to lane://provenance/** (real IPFS pinning of canonical provenance content)
git-push FOREVER forbidden — this NEVER lifts across O0/O1/O2/O3. PR-merge is the only path; lifting this would dissolve the operator-as-merge-gate invariant.
endpoint:write FOREVER forbidden — Sentry's only write path is pda-attestation-anchor + ipfs-pin via specific tool actions, NEVER raw HTTP endpoint writes.
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3 ACTING) — audit-drafting reserved for Guardian. Lifting this would dissolve the cross-fleet skill-separation invariant that justifies a >=3-agent fleet.
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — operational-diagnostic reserved for Guardian
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — marketplace-listing-review reserved for Curator
CROSS-AGENT SEPARATION (preserved at O3) — marketplace-listing-suspend reserved for Curator (setCurator() role on VAPIDataMarketplaceListings.sol)
